candidates.row_label: Depreciation, amortisation and impairment of property, plant & equipment and intangible non-current assets
candidates.why: Separate operating D&A summary line, but it is not labelled as COGS/cost of sales and appears to cover total operating D&A rather than a COGS-specific amount.
Component of the operating D&A summary, but not identified as COGS-specific; should not be added to COGS without clearer bucket linkage.
Component of the operating D&A summary, but not identified as COGS-specific; should not be added to COGS without clearer bucket linkage.
Balancing/helper line within the D&A block, not an appropriate standalone COGS D&A row.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS/cost-of-sales D&A row is shown. The visible D&A lines are separate operating expenses but are not bucketed to COGS, so adding them to COGS would risk misallocation and double counting.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation, amortisation and impairment of property, plant & equipment and intangible non-current assets
candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A summary line at the same level as Other external costs and Personnel Costs. Earlier XSGA selection explicitly excluded D&A lines, so this summary row should be added separately to XSGA rather than using its components.
Component under the D&A summary. Not chosen because the summary row is present and should be preferred to avoid double counting.
Component under the D&A summary. Not chosen because the summary row is present and should be preferred to avoid double counting.
Small balancing/helper component within the D&A block, not appropriate when the summary D&A row is available.

final_choice.row_label: Depreciation, amortisation and impairment of property, plant & equipment and intangible non-current assets

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket consists only of Other external costs and Personnel Costs, and the D&A block is presented separately above EBIT. Because a clear summary D&A row exists, choose only that row and not the lower-level component lines.
